subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned unto God! The Blessed Beauty did bestow a mighty bounty upon His sincere loved ones, in such wise that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه الی الله جمال مبارک عنایت عظیمی در حق احبای مخلصین داشتند بقسمیکه
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
